radius.$description: Radius hierarchy — moderately rounded (8px containers) with pill CTAs reserved as a high-emphasis signal. Sits center-right on the sharp<->rounded spectrum: professional and precise, but approachable. NOT uniform: inline controls round less than containers.

none.$description: Data tables, code blocks, image containers — signal structure/precision

full.$description: Pills (primary CTAs), avatars, toggle tracks, status dots — used selectively for emphasis

shadow.$description: Elevation shadows tuned for a dark surface — deeper and softer than the light-theme 0 1px 3px/0.1 cliche, since shadows read weakly on dark backgrounds.

sm.$description: Subtle lift — chips, hovered inline controls
